text:
Privacy Notice provided pursuant to Articles 13-14 of the GDPR 2016/679 (General Data Protection Regulation)

Dear Madam/Sir,
Pursuant to Article 13 of EU Regulation 2016/679 and in relation to the information we will collect, for the purpose of protecting individuals and other entities with regard to the processing of personal data, we inform you that the data provided will be processed in compliance with current legislation and the obligations of confidentiality.

Data Controller: Il Ciliegio - Azienda Agricola
The data collected will be used exclusively for order management and shipping purposes.
Your data will not be shared with third parties except where necessary for order fulfillment.
You have the right to access, rectify, or delete your personal data at any time by contacting us via WhatsApp.
